LanguageData.AD_AutoUndraft_Desc: Automatically undraft soldiers after all hostile threats are eliminated.
LanguageData.AD_FleeNonCombatants_Desc: Pacifists and non-soldiers sprint to the safest roofed area in your home zone.
LanguageData.AD_MinSkill: Minimum shooting or melee to count as soldier
LanguageData.AD_UndraftDelay: Delay before undrafting after last threat
LanguageData.AD_ThreatDetected: Auto Draft: {0} soldiers drafted! Threats detected.
LanguageData.AD_ThreatCleared: Auto Draft: Threats cleared. {0} soldiers standing down.
